glosses.ja: 混同する; 取り違える

sentences.target: Je confonds souvent la gauche et la droite.
sentences.reading: /ʒə kɔ̃fɔ̃ suvɑ̃ la ɡoʃ e la dʁwat/

translations.fr: Je confonds souvent la gauche et la droite.
translations.ipa: /ʒə kɔ̃fɔ̃ suvɑ̃ la ɡoʃ e la dʁwat/
translations.en: I often mix up left and right.
translations.es: A menudo confundo la izquierda y la derecha.
translations.de: Ich verwechsle oft links und rechts.
translations.it: Confondo spesso la sinistra e la destra.
translations.ru: Я часто путаю лево и право.
translations.pt: Eu frequentemente confundo esquerda e direita.
translations.he: אני הרבה פעמים מתבלבל בין שמאל לימין.
translations.tr: Sol ile sağı sık sık karıştırıyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi hay nhầm trái và phải.
translations.ar: أنا كثيرًا ما أخلط بين اليسار واليمين.
translations.nl: Ik haal links en rechts vaak door elkaar.
translations.uk: Я часто плутаю ліво і право.
translations.hu: Gyakran összekeverem a bal és a jobb oldalt.
translations.hi: मैं अक्सर बाएँ और दाएँ को गड़बड़ा देता हूँ.
translations.el: Συχνά μπερδεύω το αριστερά με το δεξιά.
translations.nb: Jeg forveksler ofte venstre og høyre.
translations.id: Saya sering tertukar kiri dan kanan.
translations.sv: Jag blandar ofta ihop vänster och höger.
translations.cs: Často si pletu levou a pravou.
translations.da: Jeg forveksler ofte venstre og højre.
translations.ja: 私はよく左右を間違えます。

tokens.explanation: Subject clitic pronoun, 1st person singular; agrees with the verb.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person singular; transitive, taking a coordinated direct object.
Frequency adverb modifying the verb 'confonds'.
Definite article, feminine singular, introducing 'gauche'.
Common noun, feminine; first conjunct of the coordinated direct object.
Coordinating conjunction linking 'la gauche' and 'la droite'.
Definite article, feminine singular, introducing 'droite'.
Common noun, feminine; second conjunct of the coordinated direct object.

sentences.target: Tu me confonds avec ta sœur.

translations.fr: Tu me confonds avec ta sœur.
translations.en: You’re confusing me with your sister.
translations.de: Du verwechselst mich mit deiner Schwester.
translations.ko: 너는 나를 네 여동생으로 착각하고 있어.
translations.yue: 你將我同你妹妹搞錯咗。
translations.ru: Ты путаешь меня со своей сестрой.
translations.pt: Você está me confundindo com sua irmã.
translations.vi: Bạn nhầm tôi với em gái của bạn.
translations.nl: Je verwart mij met je zus.
translations.uk: Ти плутаєш мене зі своєю сестрою.
translations.hi: तुम मुझे अपनी बहन के साथ भ्रमित कर रहे हो.
translations.el: Με μπερδεύεις με την αδελφή σου.
translations.nb: Du forveksler meg med søsteren din.
translations.id: Kamu mengira saya itu saudara perempuanmu.
translations.sv: Du blandar ihop mig med din syster.
translations.cs: Pleteš si mě se svou sestrou.
translations.da: Du forveksler mig med din søster.
translations.ja: あなたは私を自分の妹と間違えています。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; agrees with the verb.
Clitic object pronoun, 1st person singular; direct object of 'confonds'.
Main verb, present indicative 2nd person singular; takes 'me' as object.
Preposition introducing the prepositional complement 'ta sœur'.
Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular, feminine singular; modifies 'sœur'.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition 'avec'.

sentences.target: C'est facile de confondre ces deux clés.
sentences.reading: /sɛ fasil də kɔ̃fɔ̃dʁ se dø kle/

translations.fr: C'est facile de confondre ces deux clés.
translations.ipa: /sɛ fasil də kɔ̃fɔ̃dʁ se dø kle/
translations.en: It’s easy to mix up these two keys.
translations.es: Es fácil confundir estas dos llaves.
translations.de: Es ist leicht, diese beiden Schlüssel zu verwechseln.
translations.it: È facile confondere queste due chiavi.
translations.zh-Hans: 这两把钥匙很容易弄混。
translations.yue: 呢兩把鎖匙好容易搞錯。
translations.pt: É fácil confundir estas duas chaves.
translations.he: קל להתבלבל בין שני המפתחות האלה.
translations.vi: Hai chiếc chìa khóa này rất dễ bị nhầm.
translations.ar: من السهل الخلط بين هذين المفتاحين.
translations.nl: Het is makkelijk om deze twee sleutels door elkaar te halen.
translations.hu: Könnyű összekeverni ezt a két kulcsot.
translations.hi: इन दो चाबियों को आपस में मिलाना आसान है.
translations.el: Είναι εύκολο να μπερδέψει κανείς αυτά τα δύο κλειδιά.
translations.nb: Det er lett å forveksle disse to nøklene.
translations.sv: Det är lätt att blanda ihop de här två nycklarna.
translations.ro: Este ușor să confunzi aceste două chei.
translations.cs: Je snadné splést si tyhle dva klíče.
translations.da: Det er nemt at forveksle de to nøgler.
translations.fi: Näitä kahta avainta on helppo sekoittaa.
translations.ja: この二つの鍵は間違えやすいです。

tokens.explanation: Clitic pronoun serving as dummy/impersonal subject in a copular construction.
Copular auxiliary, present indicative 3rd person singular; links the subject 'C'' to the predicate.
Predicate adjective (subject complement) describing the subject via the copula.
Preposition marking an infinitival complement ('de confondre') to 'facile'.
Infinitive verb heading the non-finite clause complement introduced by 'de'.
Demonstrative determiner, plural; modifies 'clés'.
Cardinal numeral quantifying 'clés'.
Common noun, feminine plural; direct object of 'confondre'.

sentences.target: Nous confondons leurs jumeaux tout le temps.
sentences.reading: /nu kɔ̃fɔ̃dɔ̃ lœʁ ʒymo tu lə tɑ̃/

translations.fr: Nous confondons leurs jumeaux tout le temps.
translations.ipa: /nu kɔ̃fɔ̃dɔ̃ lœʁ ʒymo tu lə tɑ̃/
translations.en: We mix up their twins all the time.
translations.es: Confundimos a sus gemelos todo el tiempo.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们总是把他们的双胞胎弄混。
translations.yue: 我哋成日認錯佢哋嘅雙胞胎。
translations.ru: Мы всё время путаем их близнецов.
translations.pt: Nós confundimos os gêmeos deles o tempo todo.
translations.he: אנחנו כל הזמן מבלבלים בין התאומים שלהם.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi suốt ngày nhầm lẫn cặp sinh đôi của họ.
translations.ar: نحن نخلط بين توأميهما طوال الوقت.
translations.nl: We halen hun tweeling de hele tijd door elkaar.
translations.uk: Ми весь час плутаємо їхніх близнюків.
translations.hi: हम हर समय उनके जुड़वाँ बच्चों को आपस में मिला देते हैं.
translations.nb: Vi forveksler tvillingene deres hele tiden.
translations.id: Kami selalu bingung membedakan kembar mereka.
translations.sv: Vi blandar ihop deras tvillingar hela tiden.
translations.da: Vi forveksler deres tvillinger hele tiden.
translations.fi: Me sekoitamme heidän kaksosensa koko ajan.
translations.ja: 私たちは彼らの双子をいつも混同してしまいます。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person plural; agrees with the verb.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person plural; transitive.
Possessive determiner, 3rd person plural; modifies 'jumeaux'.
Common noun, masculine plural; direct object of 'confondons'.
Quantifying determiner in the fixed expression 'tout le temps', forming an adverbial time phrase.
Definite article introducing 'temps' within the quantified NP.
Common noun, masculine; head of the NP 'tout le temps' functioning as an adverbial modifier.
